studentsDetail.notesSent: Suurada dhan beey qaadatay masha Allah dhaqankeda io casharkeda sifican beey u fcn yihiin
Cashar yeerisna weey wada casharkeda io subuceeda weey keenta
Yeeriska waan iskugu dhex dara tanween ta io casharki hore ba
Xarfihi sida la iskugu daro io kuwan wax lagu darin ba wuu Kala bartay wuuna yeersanaya sifican
Maanta yeeris isku jira 25 erey beey qadatay
Seddex suuradood beey qadatay weeyna soo fahmaysa xarfaha sida loogu dhawaqo oo midkasta si taartiiba loogu istaago
Seddex suurad beey qadatay sido kale sida xarfaha loogu dhawaqo io tartiibta weey soo fahmaysa
Seddex suurad beey maanta yeersatay yeeriski axkaamti aan u sheegay kuma soo noqon ayado taqaan beey timi xarfaha waan u Kala saaraye Marky teeriska ku jirtay sida loogu dhawaqo س io ص  io ذ io ظ
د io ذ buu weli ku dhiban yahay
Qoralki loo diray xafada shalay maso qorin casharkisa io Kala duwanaan shaha u dhexeya xarfha isku eg sfcn buu u Kala saaraya
Suurad beey Malin walba qaadata masha Allah subaci hoose io casharkeda oo aay taqaan beey keenta
Masha Allah cashar fican beey qadata io quranki hoose oo aay hayso
Masha Allah tanween ta dhan sida xarfaha loogu aqriyo waan fahan siiye yeeriskina maanta waan u yeeriye ereyo tanween leh
Xarfahan oo adag io yeeriski isku darling baan maanta u badiye
Masha Allah xuruufti mad ka weey fahantay manta se yeeriski aay gashay kuma aaysan ficneen
Xarfihi sida ذ،ظ، ص،،س ،غ in lagu adkeeyi beey rabta marki casharka ka baxayso
Casharki shaly aan tartiib lahayn oo aan fadhin beey keentay waa loo yareeye casharka
Xuruufta meel aay u jeedan io halkay sadarka ka fafhistan midna ma yaqaan
Farta loo qabanaya alifkana ma yaqaan masha Allah waa nin wax baran karase
Casharka kutub beey ka qadatay labo bog beey qadatay
Sifican beey u yeersanaysa iskudarka afar xaraf baa dhibaye hadeer weey qoraysa
Masha Allah casharka loo diro wuukaso baxa iskudar ka xarfaha ma yaqaan ereyga u yeerisid xaraf walba meel buu ku qoraya
Xuruuful mad baan baray io xarakoyinka aay qaatan hadaan damcay inan iskugu daro weey ku wareertay wanka daaye an iskugu qaso weey ku wareertay ddka
Tartiibti beey laso qabsanaysa tajweedka weli waa adag yhy xarfahana inta badan weey qarisnaysa
Xarfaha dhawaqoda wuu dhibaya tartiibta io tajweedka xooga isbedel yar baa jiray csharki shalay la siiye
Yeeriska shadka meeshu ku jiro sida loo garto baan baraye manta
Maantu yimi cashar kelia loo dhigay
Maanta buu yimi cashar baa loo dhigay kelia
Masha Allah jus io xisibga aay soo dhaaftay waa u diyaarsan yahay
Maanta yeeriski laga joojinaya kutubka loo bedelaya
Farti sfcn buu u qoraya xarfihi dhana sifican buu ugu dhawaqaya
Yeeris
Tartiibta xarfaha sida loogu dhawaqo baa laga saxaya io tajweed ka
Tartiibta xarfaha dhawaqood io tajweedka laga saxaya
Weey yeeresanaysa yeeriska io quranka weey ku adag yihiin

studentsDetail.notesSent: Masha Allah cashar io subuc nadiifay keentay
Masha Allah casharkeeda nadiif buu aha subici beey hakashoyin keentay madama u batay
Masha Allah qoral io fahanba weey la haysta waxbadan baan u yeerin doona
Masha inti shalay wuu kaso baxay xarfka د io طbuu hakashoyin ka keenay subacana sida loo galo waa bartay
Suuradi baan u dhameeye inti hore sfcn beey u keentay subac nadiifana weey keentay
Suurada si gaara beey ugu adag thy waan u yareeye
Mantu u dhamaday  الحروف الهجائية masha Allah inatay soo dhigatay weey wada taqaan qoral io aqris ba
Masha Allah first day giisa weeye waxan siiye cashar qoral farti io casharkiba wuu ka baxay
Subuc hal laaxin kelia beey soo celisay mnta io cashar nadiifa
Masha Allah inta loo diro weey keenaysa
Masha Allah jewiga aad beey ulaso qabsan
Suurada half baan siiye aayada dheer suurada ku jirta darteed io cashrki maanta aan sidi hore ahyn subac nadiifay keentay
Masha Allah cashar io subuc nadiifay keentay
Xarafka م io ه ineey wax badan kaso qorto baan u diray
Labo laaxin kelia juski soo celisay io cshar nadiifa juskana isbedel fcn beey ku samayse
Mashal Allah cashar io subac nadiifa ayeey keentay
Xarfihi hakashada uga jiray sifican beey uso sugatay masha Allah labadan xarafna qoral ahaan beey adag yihiin wn u yareeye
Manta subaca labo laaxin io hakashoyin beey keentay cashar keedana juska labaad baa looga bilaaway
Masha Allah cashar io subuc nadiifay keentay wajibdki loo diray na weey soo buuxisay far qoraal ah
Cashar buuxin io ineey cidyha iska soo gurta loo diray lbadiba weey kaso baxday masha Allah
Qiimayn baan lahayn juski aay todobadka diyaarisay
Qiimayn baan lahayn todobadka quran aay diyaarisay
Intay soo qaadatay xuruufta aqrin io qoral labaduba weey xifdisan tahay masha Allah
Tartiib weeye laso qabsan subuc tajweed leh beey keentay io 3 laaxina
Subac io cashar nadiifa manta keentay tartiibtina aad  beey u laso qbsatay
Masha Allah wajibaad ka loo diro weey keentay
Casharki shalay labdi bog weey keentay subacana xisibka hoose kelia u diray surah البينه io الليل si gaara ugu diray oo aan xidigood fadhin
Casharki shalay loo yeeriyeoo  nadiif ah beey keentay boobsiski badnaa ma lahyn casharka, subuc beeyna ku gashay bogi aay shalay qaadatay
Labadi cashar weey isku soo dartay weeyna ficneed xarafka د beey dhawaqisa qaldayse
Labo bog oo cashar beey qadatay madama qoranka horay u dhaaftay
Hal bog oo yeeris ah beey qaadatay yeeriska aad ugma daahayso tartiibta waan ugu celceliye manta
Casharki shalay sfcn beey uso qeebtay weeyna soo wada buuxisay
Malinti u horayse ahyd cashar ma qaadan subac xisib bilaa laaxin bilaa ku dhegesid
Malinti kowada ahayd cshar ma qaadan subac beey gashy xisib ah labo laaxin beey keentay xifdigeedana aad bu u ficnaa
Masha Allah alifka weey dhmayse wax yar oo  fahan xurufaha dhexe aan u Kala saarayo io far sixid first day ahaa cashar baan siiye waxna kamaysan bixin

landingPageSettings.hikmahSomali: Wehelka Qur'aanku waligii ma dhibaatoodo, aduun iyo aakhiraba waa mid ay weheliso barako iyo xasillooni qalbi.
landingPageSettings.heroSub: KU SOO DHOWOW DUGSIGA SUBUC OO KUULA DIYAAR AH HIGGAAD MUDDO KOOBAN LAGU BARANAYO IYO XIFDI SUGAN
landingPageSettings.aboutText: Dugsiga Subuc waxaa loo aasaasay si uu ardayda u siiyo waxbarasho Qur’aan oo heer sare ah oo wanaagsan. Warbixinnadayada maalinlaha ah ee horumarka ardayga, xiriirka joogtada ah ee waalidiinta, iyo nidaamka xaadirinta waxay xaqiijiyaan hufnaan iyo isla-xisaabtan buuxa. Waxaan isku darnaa habka waxbaridda tooska ah ee dhaqanka Islaamiga ah iyo nidaamyo casri ah oo is-dhexgal leh, kuwaas oo ka dhigaya barashada mid fudud, xiiso leh, isla markaana wax ku ool ah
landingPageSettings.ayatArabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا الْقُرْآنَ يَهْدِي لِلَّتِي هِيَ أَقْوَمُ
landingPageSettings.regStep2Text: Kala saar arrimaha diiwaangelinta, harna qaado kaarka aqoonsiga ee ardayga u gaarka ah.
landingPageSettings.hadithSomali: Kan idiinku khayrka badan waa kan barta Qur'aanka kariimka ah, dadka kalena bara.
landingPageSettings.whatWeDo: Waxaan bixinnaa barnaamijyo waxbarasho oo dhammaystiran, kuwaas oo ay hagaan macallimiin shahaadooyin leh, si loo kobciyo akhlaaqda iyo qiyamka Islaamka, xifdinta Qur’aanka oo taxaddar leh, iyo barashada qawaaniinta Tajwiidka si sax ah oo hufan.
landingPageSettings.ayatSomali: Xaqiiqdii, Qur'aankan wuxuu ku hidaynayaa jidka ugu toosan uguna wanaagsan.
landingPageSettings.contactAddress: Aga gaarka jamacada frontier, Garowe, Somalia
landingPageSettings.regStep3Text: Ardayga wuxuu si toos ah ugu birayaa fasalkiisa isagoo raacaya jadwalkiisa u qorshaysan. Su'aalaha kale kala xiriir call: 0904819955.

pictures.caption: Dedicated resource center and reference library

landingPageSettings.regStep1Text: Keen ilmahaaga xarunta si loo qiimeeyo heerka xifdiga Qur'aanka iyo Tajwiidka.

cards.title: Higgaad Fiican
cards.description: Dugsigu wuxuu bixinayaa higgaad laga baranayo buug ay qoreen macalimiin khuburo ah oo ardayga muddo kooban lagu barayo

cards.title: Xifdi Quraan
cards.description: Dugsigu wuxuu lee yahay sharci adag oo ardayga u fududaynaya inuu gacanta ku hayo quranka uu soo dhafay isagoo subacyo badan lala gali doono

cards.title: Dhaqan Wanaagsan
cards.description: Dugsigu wuxuu ardayga ku ababinayaa dhaqan suuban ee islaamka iyo ixtiraamka waalidkiisa,macalimiintiisa iyo dadka kale uu la dhaqmayo
Waalidku wuxuu la socon doona heerka waxbarasho ee ardaygiisa isago lala wadaagi doono kor u kaca iyo hoos u dhaca ardayga si loo hubiyo waxbarasho dhamaystiran
cards.title: Waalidka oo la war gelinayo

landingPageSettings.regStepText: Si loo ilaaliyo amniga loonana hortago farriimaha spam-ka, waxaan u samaynaa diiwaangelinta cusub si toos ah fasallada dhexdiisa si aan ilmaha u qiimayno.
landingPageSettings.heroBadge: Xoojinta Barashada Qur'aanka ee Casriga ah

progress.faahfaahin: Malinti u horayse ahyd cashar ma qaadan subac xisib bilaa laaxin bilaa ku dhegesid
Malinti kowada ahayd cshar ma qaadan subac beey gashy xisib ah labo laaxin beey keentay xifdigeedana aad bu u ficnaa
Masha Allah alifka weey dhmayse wax yar oo  fahan xurufaha dhexe aan u Kala saarayo io far sixid first day ahaa cashar baan siiye waxna kamaysan bixin
Labo bog oo cashar beey qadatay madama qoranka horay u dhaaftay
Hal bog oo yeeris ah beey qaadatay yeeriska aad ugma daahayso tartiibta waan ugu celceliye manta
Casharki shalay sfcn beey uso qeebtay weeyna soo wada buuxisay
Casharki shalay labdi bog weey keentay subacana xisibka hoose kelia u diray surah البينه io الليل si gaara ugu diray oo aan xidigood fadhin
Casharki shalay loo yeeriyeoo  nadiif ah beey keentay boobsiski badnaa ma lahyn casharka, subuc beeyna ku gashay bogi aay shalay qaadatay
Labadi cashar weey isku soo dartay weeyna ficneed xarafka د beey dhawaqisa qaldayse
Tartiib weeye laso qabsan subuc tajweed leh beey keentay io 3 laaxina
Subac io cashar nadiifa manta keentay tartiibtina aad  beey u laso qbsatay
Masha Allah wajibaad ka loo diro weey keentay
Manta subaca labo laaxin io hakashoyin beey keentay cashar keedana juska labaad baa looga bilaaway
Masha Allah cashar io subuc nadiifay keentay wajibdki loo diray na weey soo buuxisay far qoraal ah
Cashar buuxin io ineey cidyha iska soo gurta loo diray lbadiba weey kaso baxday masha Allah
Labo laaxin kelia juski soo celisay io cshar nadiifa juskana isbedel fcn beey ku samayse
Mashal Allah cashar io subac nadiifa ayeey keentay
Xarfihi hakashada uga jiray sifican beey uso sugatay masha Allah labadan xarafna qoral ahaan beey adag yihiin wn u yareeye
Qiimayn baan lahayn juski aay todobadka diyaarisay
Qiimayn baan lahayn todobadka quran aay diyaarisay

Suurada half baan siiye aayada dheer suurada ku jirta darteed io cashrki maanta aan sidi hore ahyn subac nadiifay keentay
Masha Allah cashar io subuc nadiifay keentay
Xarafka م io ه ineey wax badan kaso qorto baan u diray
Subuc hal laaxin kelia beey soo celisay mnta io cashar nadiifa
